reviews.review_description: Why am i stuck in the wall
10/10 about 1 bug in every level but not game breaking and very fun very cool
I’m sorry Becuase I’m sure it took a long time to publish and create this app but I just don’t like it
Game does as intended  as intended add more scps
This is is such a good game add multiplayer make a SCP SL type or a game like labrat I have faith in this game most important W game would recommend.

The reason 4 stars because I think the graphics, visuals and environments need to be polished and improved. Maybe more realistic monsters could be added and  background environments to cover those voided backgrounds. Then definitely 5 star

reviews.review_title: Honest Review, Game has huge potential!
reviews.review_description: I love scp related games, lore, etc. So the moment I saw this game at 2:00am I knew it was fate. I instantly bought it played it until my headset died and nearly finished it the next day (today for me). The game is very lore accurate and respects the fandom. The controls are mostly simple and the motion comfort is very smooth and will give you little to none, if any at all. The game is clearly free built and made with the creators individual take on scp. The different “tests” are mostly well built and could be nearly perfect with a few tweaks. SPOILER WARNING BEYOND THIS POINT! The tweaks that I highly recommend to be made is for the 087 ghost to be a slightly darker for a scarier effect (btw I loved the end of test 3 for 087, supurb work!). Another tweak is for a bug I found, on test 1 for 3199 when the shotgun was lowered on the platform the shells would often roll off or the gun would get stuck halfway inside of the platform. Also it would highly improve the quality on test 1 for 3199 if the transition between platforms was faster because you may wait around for a whole minute or longer for a platform to start lowering. Another thing that could be fixed was I noticed was the were invisible barriers blocking bullets on test 3 for 3199 at the part when you get the rifle and are shooting at the crowd of 3199. A small recommendation I have is to maybe make the 024 tests slightly easier by slowing down the speed of the axes and hammers. Finally the last thing I wish to address is test 3 for 096, I was unable to complete that test due to not knowing how to apply the hood once I got close to 096 maybe the text at the start could explain it better, other than that the whole scene was pretty cool to see. Thank you for the amazing game keep up the great work and hope to see some more scps in the future :)

developer_response.body: Hello I want to thank you for your comment.I continue to work on optimization I hope that the next patch will correct your problem. I will definitely consider your opinion and make the game better.
